sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.60b (beta): Results-table polish for the 'Needs Extra Time' state — the note now wraps after 'Needs Extra Time —' so the URL column keeps a readable width; the Rescan ET Candidates button renders as the primary (blue) action when ET candidates exist; and Download CU Import File goes dormant on scans that produced 0 rules. Display-only. Carries 1.7.59b (ET-directing noopt copy + et_charged row field) and the 1.7.58b uncacheable status-poll fix.
